my_thoughts: The ontological_shift mechanism with RM_05 feels like rationalizing_need_for_guru is being met with a specific geometric cut. But what if the geometry itself is what they're resisting? The defends_dependency, distinguishes_guidance_types suggests they're aware of something but can't name it.
accumulated_insight: T4 (Final): Student 'The scriptures show the general directions but the individual needs personal ins'—now rationalizing need for guru. Episode complete after 4 turns, moving from seeking transactional instruction to rationalizing need for guru. Teaching arc used ontological shift in REMAKING phase to address defends dependency, distinguishes guidance types. Student progressed through 4-turn teaching sequence.
visible_response:
Your own self is your ultimate teacher (sadguru).
The outer teacher (Guru) is merely a milestone. It is only your inner teacher that will walk with you to the goal, for he is the goal.
